mapper.select:
/* SapPerformanceMapper.xml inboundSendTargetListASN ASN BASE */ SELECT CH.EXTERNORDERKEY AS SENDKEY , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS SEND_CNT , CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , 'RDC' || '_' || CH.EXTERNORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(CH.SAPSENDSEQ, '0')+1::TEXT, 3, '0') AS SYSID , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT AS OR_HD_DT , CASE WHEN IU.ICUNITQTY > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/IU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS CFQTY , CASE WHEN SD.UOM=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.UOM END AS UOM , MAX(CH.COMMENTS) AS COMMENTS FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CH.EXTERNORDERKEY = SD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND SD.WKSTATUS <> '40' JOIN ( SELECT CO.OWKEY , CO.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CO.EXTERNORDERKEY , SUM(1) OVER( PARTITION BY CO.EXTERNORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT , SUM( CASE WHEN CO.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) OVER( PARTITION BY CO.EXTERNORDERKEY ) AS COMPLETE_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CO WHERE CO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CO.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND CO.WKSTATUS <> 'CANCEL' ) CHK_CO ON CHK_CO.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND CHK_CO.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON CH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON SD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.UOM = IU.ICUNITTYPE WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND OT.IBYN = 'Y' AND OT.OBYN = 'N' AND OM.TRANYN = 'Y' AND CH.WKSTATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND CHK_CO.TOT_CNT = CHK_CO.COMPLETE_CNT AND OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='ASN' AND COALESCE(CH.SAPTRANSFAILYN, 'N') != 'P'
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) <= 3 /*정상JOB*/
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) > 3 /*실패JOB*/
GROUP BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CH.SAPSENDSEQ , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT , IU.ICUNITQTY , SD.UOM ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY

/* SapPerformanceMapper.xml inboundSendTargetListSPLT SPLT BASE */ SELECT CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AS SENDKEY , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY) AS SEND_CNT , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , 'RDC' || '_' || CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(CH.SAPSENDSEQ, '0')+1::TEXT, 3, '0') AS SYSID , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT AS OR_HD_DT , CASE WHEN IU.ICUNITQTY > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/IU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS CFQTY , CASE WHEN SD.UOM=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.UOM END AS UOM , MAX(CH.COMMENTS) AS COMMENTS FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON CH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON SD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.UOM = IU.ICUNITTYPE WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND OT.IBYN = 'Y' AND OT.OBYN = 'N' AND OM.TRANYN = 'Y' AND CH.WKSTATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='SPLT' AND COALESCE(CH.SAPTRANSFAILYN, 'N') != 'P'
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) <= 3 /*정상JOB*/
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) > 3 /*실패JOB*/
GROUP BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , CH.SAPSENDSEQ , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT , IU.ICUNITQTY , SD.UOM ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY

/* SapPerformanceMapper.xml outboundSendTargetListASN ASN BASE */ SELECT CH.EXTERNORDERKEY AS SENDKEY , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS SEND_CNT , CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , 'RDC' || '_' || CH.EXTERNORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(CH.SAPSENDSEQ, '0')+1::TEXT, 3, '0') AS SYSID , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT AS OR_HD_DT , CH.EXTORDERTYPECD AS EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUNITQTY > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/IU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS CFQTY , CASE WHEN SD.UOM=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.UOM END AS UNIT , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SU.ICUNITQTY, 0) > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/SU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS COVERTQTY , CASE WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.SALEUNIT END AS SALEUNIT , MAX(WP.EXPIREDATE) AS EXPIREDATE , #{deliveryPersonId} AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , CH.DELIVERY_NO FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CH.EXTERNORDERKEY = SD.EXTERNORDERKEY AND SD.WKSTATUS <> '40' JOIN ( SELECT CO.OWKEY , CO.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , CO.EXTERNORDERKEY , SUM(1) OVER( PARTITION BY CO.EXTERNORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT , SUM( CASE WHEN CO.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) OVER( PARTITION BY CO.EXTERNORDERKEY ) AS COMPLETE_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CO WHERE CO.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CO.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND CO.WKSTATUS <> 'CANCEL' ) CHK_CO ON CHK_CO.OWKEY = CH.OWKEY AND CHK_CO.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP ON SD.OWKEY = WP.OWKEY AND SD.EXTERNORDERKEY = WP.EXTERNORDERKEY AND SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = WP.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AND WP.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON CH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON SD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.UOM = IU.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE SU ON IC.OWKEY = SU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = SU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.SALEUNIT = SU.ICUNITTYPE WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND OT.IBYN = 'N' AND OT.OBYN = 'Y' AND OM.TRANYN = 'Y' AND CH.WKSTATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='ASN' AND COALESCE(CH.SAPTRANSFAILYN, 'N') != 'P' AND CHK_CO.TOT_CNT = CHK_CO.COMPLETE_CNT
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) <= 3 /*정상JOB*/
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) > 3 /*실패JOB*/
GROUP BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CH.SAPSENDSEQ , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CH.EXTORDERTYPECD , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , IU.ICUNITQTY , SU.ICUNITQTY , SD.UOM , SD.SALEUNIT , CH.DELIVERY_NO ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY

/* SapPerformanceMapper.xml outboundSendTargetListSPLT SPLIT BASE */ SELECT CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AS SENDKEY , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY) AS SEND_CNT , CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY AS EXTERNORDERLINENUM , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , 'RDC' || '_' || CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY || '_' || LPAD(COALESCE(CH.SAPSENDSEQ, '0')+1::TEXT, 3, '0') AS SYSID , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT AS OR_HD_DT , CH.EXTORDERTYPECD AS EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , CASE WHEN IU.ICUNITQTY > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/IU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS CFQTY , CASE WHEN SD.UOM=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.UOM=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.UOM END AS UNIT , CASE WHEN COALESCE(SU.ICUNITQTY, 0) > 0 THEN TRUNC(SUM(SD.CFQTY)/SU.ICUNITQTY, 3) ELSE SUM(SD.CFQTY) END AS COVERTQTY , CASE WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{boxuom} THEN #{boxexternuom} WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{boluom} THEN #{bolexternuom} WHEN SD.SALEUNIT=#{eauom} THEN #{eaexternuom} ELSE SD.SALEUNIT END AS SALEUNIT , MAX(WP.EXPIREDATE) AS EXPIREDATE , #{deliveryPersonId} AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , CH.DELIVERY_NO FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON CH.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE WP ON SD.OWKEY = WP.OWKEY AND SD.SO_HDKEY = WP.SO_HDKEY AND SD.SO_DTKEY = WP.SO_DTKEY AND WP.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON CH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON SD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND SD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON IC.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.UOM = IU.ICUNITTYPE LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE SU ON IC.OWKEY = SU.OWKEY AND IC.ICUNITKEY = SU.ICUNITKEY AND SD.SALEUNIT = SU.ICUNITTYPE WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND OT.IBYN = 'N' AND OT.OBYN = 'Y' AND OM.TRANYN = 'Y' AND CH.WKSTATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND OT.PERFORMANCETYPE ='SPLT' AND COALESCE(CH.SAPTRANSFAILYN, 'N') != 'P'
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) <= 3 /*정상JOB*/
AND COALESCE(CH.FAILCNT, 0) > 3 /*실패JOB*/
GROUP BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , CH.SAPSENDSEQ , CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CH.EXTORDERTYPECD , CH.CTKEY , SD.ICKEY , IU.ICUNITQTY , SU.ICUNITQTY , SD.UOM , SD.SALEUNIT , CH.DELIVERY_NO ORDER BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , SD.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY

/* SapPerformanceMapper.xml outboundSendDeliveryList */ SELECT CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , DR.URKEY AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , ROLL.LDLEGID AS DELIVERY_NO FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON CH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD AND OT.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON CH.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = SH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY JOIN TORDER_INFO_ORTYPE_MAPPING OM ON CH.OWKEY = OM.OWKEY AND CH.EXTORDERTYPECD = OM.EXTERN_OR_TYPE_CD AND CH.OR_TYPE_CD = OM.OR_TYPE_CD AND OM.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TT_SHPM_LEG_T ROLL ON SH.SO_HDKEY = ROLL.SHPMNO AND ROLL.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TT_LOAD_T LOAD ON ROLL.LDLEGID = LOAD.LDLEGID AND ROLL.DELYN = LOAD.DELYN JOIN TT_DRVR_T DR ON DR.DRVNO = LOAD.DRVNO WHERE CH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CH.DELIVERY_HD_DT BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND OT.IBYN = 'N' AND OT.OBYN = 'Y' AND OM.TRANYN = 'Y' AND CH.WKSTATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND CH.EXTERNORDERKEY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CH.EXTERNORDERKEY , CH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , DR.URKEY , ROLL.LDLEGID
